response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js work and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) that directly matches a key requirement. Demonstrated breadth across frontend (React, Ember), backend (Node.js, GraphQL), databases (MongoDB, MySQL), cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and testing/TDD practices. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, and explicit Kotlin/Java production depth, but the engineering foundation, polyglot history, and craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS) make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Strong recent TypeScript/Node.js full-stack delivery plus active AI-agent/MCP tooling work
Polyglot background (TS, Java, C/C++, D, PHP) with cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and MongoDB experience
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, trunk-based dev, CI/CD, OSS maintainership, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the primary stack
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears older and limited in scope
PostgreSQL/relational depth understated compared to MongoDB and NoSQL exposure

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience depth (15+ years, TS/Node + React)
Missing Nest.js and Kotlin in stated stack
